IF and ONLY IF you know what you are doing should you attempt wild mushrooms.

I have found a decent amount of Chanterelle mushrooms here as well as some edible puffballs and other varieties.

A public trail maintained by the mountain stewards will take you at several points around the edge of this public library's parking lot. Several smaller blackberry bushes around this small trail. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
Golden raspberries were planted here. Not going to get tons but they sure are tasty! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
